editorialPrinciple: Care is shown through ordinary habits, not wealth, perfection, or minimalist display.

models.identityNotes: Short softly wavy black bob, full brows, small gap between the front teeth, open attentive expression.
models.editorialPersona: Mends a cloth tote, buys one seasonal flower, and walks to a neighborhood bakery on quiet mornings.

models.identityNotes: Short side-parted dark hair, tapered nape, hooded eyes, small mole near the right eyebrow.
models.editorialPersona: Keeps a weather notebook, cooks one seasonal soup well, repairs textiles, and chooses a bicycle when time allows.

models.identityNotes: Unruly dark hair with one silver patch, narrow face, round glasses, faint moustache and chin stubble.
models.editorialPersona: Visits secondhand bookshops, repairs shoes, hand-grinds Sunday coffee, and keeps a folded street map.

models.identityNotes: Loose shoulder-length curls with a broad silver streak, strong cheekbones, birthmark near the left jaw.
models.editorialPersona: Enjoys an old compact car, local ceramics, Saturday markets, and records played from beginning to end.

models.identityNotes: Close-cropped salt-and-pepper hair, short gray beard, round face, deep laugh lines, capable hands.
models.editorialPersona: Cleans tools after use, grows balcony herbs, listens to jazz without multitasking, and records repairs in a notebook.

models.identityNotes: Chin-length silver bob, angular face with visible age lines, muted-red round glasses, composed witty expression.
models.editorialPersona: Takes slow train trips, visits museums alone, wraps books in cloth, sends seasonal letters, and repairs hems without seeking perfection.
